title: Sprint Contract Template — v2 (P8-aware)
description: Structure for the per-sprint contract files emitted by onboard:generate (v2 path) at <projectPath>/docs/sprint-contracts/sprint-<N>.json. The deploymentTargets array is driven by phases.P8.cicd.envLadder, replacing the v1 flat 'targetEnv' field. The exitCriteria.mustPass array integrates with the harness verification flow used by /onboard:verify --sprint.

schemaVersion.description: Sprint contract schema version. v2 splits deployment into envLadder-driven array; v1 used a flat targetEnv string.

name.description: Human-readable sprint name (e.g., 'MVP foundation'). Sourced from docs/feature-list.json's sprint groupings.

features.description: Feature IDs included in this sprint (e.g., ['F001', 'F002']). Cross-references docs/feature-list.json.

deploymentTargets.description: Ordered list of environments this sprint must successfully deploy to before the sprint can close. DERIVED FROM phases.P8.cicd.envLadder — each env in the ladder becomes a target with appropriate verification rules. v1 had a single 'targetEnv' string; v2's array supports staging→prod ladders and preview-environment workflows.

verification.description: How to verify the deployment to this env succeeded. Composes onboard's verify skill with environment-specific URL/credentials.

url.description: Substituted at deploy time from CI env vars (e.g., ${PREVIEW_URL}).

smokeTests.description: Test IDs that must pass post-deploy.

rollback.description: Per-target rollback config. Inherits from phases.P8.cicd.rollback but can be overridden per env (e.g., prod requires manual approval even if other envs auto-rollback).

exitCriteria.description: Hard gates that must pass before this sprint can close. /onboard:verify --sprint <N> runs these and fails the sprint if any gate fails. The mustPass array is the canonical exit gate.

mustPass.description: Boolean assertions evaluated against project state at sprint-close time. Each entry maps to a verifier method.

description.description: Human-readable assertion (e.g., 'All Sprint 1 features pass their verification steps').

criticality.description: blocking: sprint cannot close. advisory: warning only. Defaults to blocking.

metadata.description: Provenance and bookkeeping. Onboard writes these at generation time.

p8SnapshotAtGeneration.description: Snapshot of phases.P8.cicd at generation time. If P8 changes later (via /greenfield:resume), this snapshot becomes stale and the sprint contract should be regenerated. Tracked by the freshness hook for /docs/architecture/.

mustPass.description: All Sprint 1 features pass their verification steps
Preview and prod deployments are green
P8 synthesis record exists and is approved
